name: BUS TZ PAWA — Trip Lifecycle Messages

parameters.query:
WITH due AS (
  SELECT b.id, b.ref, b.passenger_name, b.phone, t.departure_at, r.origin, r.destination,
         s.seat_number, COALESCE(bs.plate, 'TBD') AS plate
  FROM bookings b
  JOIN trips t ON t.id = b.trip_id
  JOIN routes r ON r.id = t.route_id
  JOIN seats s ON s.id = b.seat_id
  LEFT JOIN buses bs ON bs.id = t.bus_id
  WHERE b.status = 'CONFIRMED'
    AND b.reminder_sent = FALSE
    AND t.departure_at BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '28 minute' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '32 minute'
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE bookings SET reminder_sent = TRUE WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM due) RETURNING id
)
SELECT * FROM due;

WITH due AS (
  SELECT b.id, b.ref, b.passenger_name, b.phone
  FROM bookings b
  JOIN trips t ON t.id = b.trip_id
  WHERE b.status = 'CONFIRMED'
    AND b.midtrip_sent = FALSE
    AND t.departure_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '70 minute' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '50 minute'
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE bookings SET midtrip_sent = TRUE WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM due) RETURNING id
)
SELECT * FROM due;

WITH due AS (
  SELECT b.id, b.ref, b.passenger_name, b.phone, r.destination
  FROM bookings b
  JOIN trips t ON t.id = b.trip_id
  JOIN routes r ON r.id = t.route_id
  WHERE b.status = 'CONFIRMED'
    AND b.feedback_sent = FALSE
    AND (t.departure_at + (r.duration_hrs * INTERVAL '1 hour'))
        BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minute' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minute'
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE bookings SET feedback_sent = TRUE WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM due) RETURNING id
)
SELECT * FROM due;

WITH due AS (
  SELECT b.id, b.ref, b.passenger_name, b.phone
  FROM bookings b
  JOIN trips t ON t.id = b.trip_id
  JOIN routes r ON r.id = t.route_id
  WHERE b.status = 'CONFIRMED'
    AND b.welcome_sent = FALSE
    AND (t.departure_at + (r.duration_hrs * INTERVAL '1 hour') + INTERVAL '30 minute')
        BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minute' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minute'
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE bookings SET welcome_sent = TRUE, status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM due) RETURNING id
)
SELECT * FROM due;
